text:
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915B_WVR_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “02” (1915(b) waiver program) in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD. Please note that this indicator is not set to 1 when there is an 
instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD set to “05,” “12,” “18,” or “22” (1915(b) waiver 
concurrent with another operating authority). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
